days.text: Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers at first. Force 3 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Fine apart from cloudy periods. One or two showers at first. Force 4 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 3 to 5 south to southwesterly winds.
Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Very hot. Mainly fine. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
